title: The Flip Side
overview: Centred around Ronnie, a struggling restaurateur who is mired in debt and the fallout from her previous short-lived romance with British actor Henry. Ronnie’s now living with laidback, loyal Jeff, but her world is turned upside down when Henry returns to Australia with his French lover Sophie in tow.

trailers.title: THE FLIP SIDE | Official Trailer #1 | In Cinemas August 30, 2018
